evidences.title: 2021–22 FC Red Bull Salzburg season — Grokipedia
evidences.content: Salzburg's results demonstrated steady progression, starting with three consecutive wins: a 3–1 away triumph over Sturm Graz on 23 July, a 7–1 home rout of SV Ried on 1 August, and a 1–0 home victory against Austria Vienna on 8 August. Their only setback occurred on 14 August, a narrow 0–1 away loss to Admira Wacker, which briefly halted their momentum but proved an anomaly.(#ref-7)](#ref-7) From matchday 5 onward, Salzburg went unbeaten, posting 16 wins and 4 draws in their remaining 18 games. Notable results included a 2–0 away win at Wolfsberger AC on 25 September, a 4–1 home victory over Sturm Graz on 24 October, and a commanding 5–0 home thrashing of WSG Tirol on 11 December.
